response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ year experience requirement with nearly two decades of full-stack work, current hands-on TypeScript/Node.js product development, and directly relevant AI-agent infrastructure experience (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks) — a rare and explicitly required skill. Strong testing culture (TDD, authored test frameworks, taught testing courses), cloud/container experience (AWS CDK, Kubernetes, Docker), and MongoDB/MySQL cover most required skills. Gaps are framework-specific rather than fundamental: no stated Nest.js, Kotlin, or Vitest/Playwright experience, and his frontend depth leans toward Ember rather than React, though he used React at Optilyz.
strengths: AI agent development experience (MCP tooling, agentic frameworks) — an uncommon required skill he directly matches
Deep full-stack TypeScript/Node.js background with cloud (AWS CDK), Docker/Kubernetes, and MongoDB/SQL databases
Exceptional testing and craftsmanship credentials: TDD practitioner, test-framework author, and testing workshop instructor
concerns: No stated Nest.js or Kotlin experience, both named in the primary/secondary stack
Frontend experience is Ember-heavy; React exposure appears limited to one role
No explicit Vitest or Playwright experience, and Python is absent from his skill list

key_factors.factor: Full-stack TypeScript/Node.js depth and years of experience
Missing Nest.js/Kotlin and limited React depth
